title: jatropha integerrima var. hastata
intro: Jatropha integerrima var. hastata, also known as the red birdwood or bird's eye tree, is a plant species in the spurge family (Euphorbiaceae). The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Jatropha integerrima var. hastata include treating wounds, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant is often prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal and therapeutic properties.
